activities.description: Add a feature layer to the map from a URL, with optional related tables. Supports ArcGIS Online and Enterprise (token or API key).

layerUrl.description: URL of a FeatureServer or a specific layer (.../FeatureServer or .../FeatureServer/0). Add the url avec the relation tables if you want it to be added
layerUrl.name: layerUrl

apiKey.description: ArcGIS Enterprise Token or ArcGIS Online API key
apiKey.name: apiKey

loadRelatedTables.description: Détecte et ajoute automatiquement les related tables
loadRelatedTables.name: loadRelatedTables

serverUrl.description: URL of the rooot of ArcGIS Enterprise (ex: https://myserver/arcgis). Empty = ArcGIS Online.
serverUrl.name: serverUrl

mapId.description: ID of the Map target. Use the default map if empty.
mapId.name: mapId

layerId.description: ID of the main layer added — usable in Get Layer
layerId.name: layerId

relatedTableIds.description: IDs of the related tables added
relatedTableIds.name: relatedTableIds
